blockingIssues.description: The detail page renders `scanned_at` metadata instead of an installation timestamp, and no install-time field is surfaced anywhere in the detail/installations UI, so VAL-DET-001 is still unmet.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the scrutiny review/validator procedure so Task-spawned `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` subagents can run with automatic execution approval in this worker environment, or document the manual-review fallback explicitly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In this validation run, the Task invocation for `skill-detail-page` exited immediately with `Exec ended early: insufficient permission to proceed`, so the validator had to perform the feature review manually after checking the handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff.
